task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events, with environment variables for a DynamoDB table name and CloudWatch log level
solution_criteria: Must include: Lambda function name, runtime specification, IAM role ARN, environment variables object with DynamoDB table name and log level keys, S3 event trigger configuration with bucket and event types (s3:ObjectCreated:*), and timeout setting

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 object key path and returns True if it matches the pattern for valid CloudTrail logs (accounts/ACCOUNT-ID/CloudTrail/REGION/YEAR/MONTH/DAY/)
solution_criteria: Must be a function that accepts a string parameter, validates the CloudTrail path structure using the specified format, returns a boolean, and handles edge cases like empty strings or malformed paths

task: Create a regex pattern that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the standard format (arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT-ID:role/ROLE-NAME)
solution_criteria: Must match valid IAM role ARNs with 12-digit account IDs and alphanumeric role names, reject invalid formats, handle role names with hyphens and underscores, and not match other resource types (users, policies, etc.)
